name: deepseek-v4-pro
description: DeepSeek-V4-Pro is a frontier Mixture-of-Experts model with a large context window and three reasoning modes.

name: nemotron-3-ultra
description: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra is built for high-throughput reasoning and long-running agent workflows.

name: lfm2.5
description: LFM2.5-8B-A1B, an edge model built for fast, reliable tool calling on consumer hardware.

name: medgemma
description: MedGemma is a collection of Gemma 3 variants that are trained for performance on medical text and image comprehension.

name: north-mini-code-1.0
description: North Mini Code is Cohere's first model for developers — a 30B Mixture-of-Experts model with 3B active parameters, built for agentic software engineering.

name: laguna-xs-2.1
description: Laguna XS 2.1 is a 33B total parameter Mixture-of-Experts model with 3B activated parameters per token designed for agentic coding and long-horizon work on a local machine.

name: minicpm-v4.5
description: A GPT-4o Level MLLM for Single Image, Multi Image and High-FPS Video Understanding on Your Phone

name: minicpm-v4.6
description: A Pocket-Sized MLLM for Ultra-Efficient Image and Video Understanding on Your Phone

name: glm-5.2
description: GLM-5.2 is Z.ai’s flagship model for the era of long-horizon tasks.

name: ornith
description: A self-improving family of open-source models for agentic coding

name: kimi-k2.7-code
description: Kimi K2.7 Code is Moonshot AI's coding-focused agentic model built upon Kimi K2.6, with substantial improvements on real-world long-horizon coding tasks and roughly 30% lower thinking-token usage.

name: granite4.1-guardian
description: Granite Guardian 4.1 is a specialized safety and judging model from IBM Research that evaluates whether LLM prompts and responses meet specified harm criteria.

name: deepseek-v4-flash
description: DeepSeek-V4-Flash is a preview of the DeepSeek-V4 series, a Mixture-of-Experts model with 284B total parameters and 13B activated, built for efficient reasoning across a 1M-token context window.

name: medgemma1.5
description: MedGemma 1.5 4B is an updated version of the MedGemma 4B model.

name: minimax-m3
description: MiniMax M3: Coding & Agentic Frontier. 1M context window. Native Multimodality.

name: qwen3.6
description: Qwen3.6 delivers substantial upgrades in agentic coding and thinking preservation than previous Qwen models.

name: mistral-medium-3.5
description: Mistral Medium 3.5 is the first flagship model of Mistral AI that merged instruction-following, reasoning, and coding in a single set of 128B weights.

name: granite4.1
description: IBM Granite Models are a family of enterprise-ready, open foundation models that support multilingual capabilities, coding, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), tool use, and structured JSON output. Released under Apache 2.0 license.

name: nemotron3
description: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano Omni is a multimodal large language model that unifies video, audio, image, and text understanding to support enterprise-grade Q&A, summarization, transcription, and document intelligence workflows.

name: laguna-xs.2
description: Laguna XS.2 is a 33B total parameter Mixture-of-Experts model with 3B activated parameters per token designed for agentic coding and long-horizon work on a local machine.
